text.title: testing-with-assistive-technology Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the artefact produced by the testing-with-assistive-technology methodology. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: Missing __faion_header__; CI tools empty; manual screen_readers list <2; missing at_user_quarterly; bug-report wcag_sc not required.

list.item: Any bug_report_format flag set to false.
